label: Agent
summary: Engine turn limit, gateway request budget, and default system prompt.

fields.name: max_turns
fields.label: Max turns
fields.help: Maximum model turns per user request before the engine bails out.

fields.name: gateway_timeout
fields.label: Gateway timeout (seconds)
fields.help: Seconds a gateway request may run before being cancelled. 0 uses the gateway default.

fields.name: default_system_prompt
fields.label: Default system prompt
fields.help: Prepended to every new session's system prompt, right after the agent identity block. Empty means no extra prompt.

label: Auxiliary provider
summary: Secondary provider for compression, vision, and background tasks. Leave all fields blank to reuse the main provider.

fields.name: provider
fields.label: Provider
fields.help: Provider factory. Leave blank to reuse the main provider.

fields.name: model
fields.label: Model
fields.help: Provider-qualified id; optional — falls back to the main provider's default.

label: Benchmark
summary: Defaults for `hermind bench` (skills) and `hermind bench replay` (memory replay).

fields.name: dataset_size
fields.label: Dataset size
fields.help: Number of synthetic items per benchmark run. Default 50.

fields.name: seed
fields.label: Random seed
fields.help: Deterministic seed for dataset generation. Default 42.

fields.name: judge_model
fields.label: Judge model (default)
fields.help: Default judge model. Empty falls back to the auxiliary model, then the primary model. Used by every bench subtree unless overridden.

fields.name: out_dir
fields.label: Output directory
fields.help: Where bench artifacts are written. Default .hermind/benchmark.

fields.name: replay.default_mode
fields.label: Replay default mode
fields.help: Replay invocation mode. cold = run-without-history; contextual = run-with-history.

fields.name: replay.default_history_cap
fields.label: Replay history cap
fields.help: Max prior turns injected into a contextual replay. 0 means "use the built-in default of 20 when mode is contextual".

fields.name: replay.default_judge
fields.label: Replay default judge mode
fields.help: Judge mode for replay outputs. none = skip judging; pairwise = compare current vs baseline; rubric+pairwise = pairwise plus a rubric score pass.

fields.name: replay.out_dir
fields.label: Replay output directory
fields.help: Where replay datasets and run records land. Default .hermind/replay.

fields.name: replay.judge_model
fields.label: Replay judge model (override)
fields.help: Override judge model for replay only. Empty falls back to the parent benchmark.judge_model.

label: Browser
summary: Browser automation provider. Leave blank for no browser integration.

fields.name: provider
fields.label: Provider
fields.help: Browser automation backend. Leave blank to disable.

fields.name: browserbase.api_key
fields.label: Browserbase API key
fields.help: Env var BROWSERBASE_API_KEY overrides this value at runtime.

fields.name: browserbase.project_id
fields.label: Browserbase project ID
fields.help: Env var BROWSERBASE_PROJECT_ID overrides this value at runtime.

fields.name: camofox.base_url
fields.label: Camofox base URL
fields.help: Defaults to http://localhost:9377 when blank.

label: Cron jobs
summary: Scheduled prompts that run on a recurring schedule.

fields.name: name
fields.label: Name
fields.help: Stable identifier for this job.

fields.name: schedule
fields.label: Schedule
fields.help: Cron expression or "every 5m" / "every 1h" shorthand.

fields.name: prompt
fields.label: Prompt
fields.help: Prompt text to send. For long prompts, edit YAML directly.

fields.name: model
fields.label: Model override
fields.help: Leave blank to use the default model.

label: Fallback Providers
summary: Ordered list of providers tried in turn when the primary fails.

fields.name: model
fields.label: Model
fields.help: Optional — provider-qualified id used when this fallback is active.

label: IM Channels
summary: Multi-platform IM adapters (Feishu, Telegram, Slack, Discord, WeChat, DingTalk)

fields.name: options.bot_token
fields.label: Bot Token
fields.help: Bot API token from @BotFather.

fields.name: options.proxy_url
fields.label: HTTP Proxy URL
fields.help: Optional HTTP proxy (useful in restrictive regions).

fields.name: options.verification_token
fields.label: Verification Token
fields.help: Event webhook verification token.

fields.name: options.encrypt_key
fields.label: Encrypt Key
fields.help: Optional message encryption key.

fields.name: options.signing_secret
fields.label: Signing Secret
fields.help: Webhook request signing secret.

fields.name: options.app_token
fields.label: App-Level Token
fields.help: xapp-... token for Socket Mode.

fields.name: options.application_id
fields.label: Application ID
fields.help: Discord application / client ID.

fields.name: options.token
fields.label: Webhook Token
fields.help: Webhook verification token.

fields.name: options.encoding_aes_key
fields.label: Encoding AES Key
fields.help: Message encryption key (43 characters).

fields.name: options.robot_code
fields.label: Robot Code
fields.help: Group robot code.

label: Logging
summary: slog output level for the hermind process.

fields.name: level
fields.label: Level
fields.help: Minimum log level emitted to stderr.

label: MCP servers
summary: Model Context Protocol servers launched on CLI/gateway startup.

fields.name: command
fields.label: Command
fields.help: Executable to run, e.g. "npx" or a full path.

fields.name: enabled
fields.label: Enabled
fields.help: Disabled servers never start. Delete the entry to remove it entirely. Edit config.yaml directly to configure args/env.

label: Memory
summary: Optional external long-term memory provider. Leave blank for no external memory.

fields.name: provider
fields.label: Provider
fields.help: External memory backend. Leave blank for no external memory.

label: Metrics
summary: Prometheus /metrics HTTP server address. Leave blank to disable.

fields.name: addr
fields.label: Listen address
fields.help: Host:port for the exporter, e.g. ":9100". Empty disables metrics.

label: Default model
summary: Model used when a request doesn't pin one explicitly.

fields.name: model
fields.label: Model
fields.help: Provider-qualified id, e.g. anthropic/claude-opus-4-7.

label: User presence
summary: Three-state presence framework that gates background workers (idle consolidator, future schedulers).

fields.name: http_idle_absent_after_seconds
fields.label: HTTP-idle quiet window (seconds)
fields.help: Time without inbound HTTP requests before the user is voted Absent. Default 300 (5 min). 0 disables the signal.

fields.name: sleep_window.enabled
fields.label: Sleep window enabled
fields.help: When on, votes Absent during the configured local-clock hours. Never votes Present (insomnia/night-shift case).

fields.name: sleep_window.start
fields.label: Sleep window start (HH:MM)
fields.help: Local-clock start time, 24-hour format. Cross-midnight windows are supported (e.g., 22:00 → 06:00).

fields.name: sleep_window.end
fields.label: Sleep window end (HH:MM)
fields.help: Local-clock end time, 24-hour format.

fields.name: sleep_window.timezone
fields.label: Timezone (IANA name)
fields.help: IANA timezone name, e.g. America/Los_Angeles. Empty = process local timezone.

label: Providers
summary: LLM providers available to Default Model, Auxiliary, and fallback.

fields.name: model
fields.label: Default model for this provider
fields.help: Optional — provider-qualified id used when a request doesn't pin a specific model.

label: Anthropic /v1/messages proxy
summary: Expose an Anthropic-compatible Messages API endpoint at /v1/messages. Off by default.

fields.name: enabled
fields.label: Enable proxy
fields.help: Mount the /v1/messages route at the API server root. Restart hermind after toggling.

fields.name: keep_alive_seconds
fields.label: SSE keep-alive interval (seconds)
fields.help: Heartbeat ping interval on the streaming response. Default 15. Values <= 0 are clamped to 15.

label: Skills
summary: Enable or disable installed skills. The list reflects what's in <instance>/skills/.

fields.name: disabled
fields.label: Disabled skills
fields.help: Skills listed here never activate. Names mirror entries under $HERMIND_HOME/skills.

fields.name: auto_extract
fields.label: Auto-extract skills
fields.help: After each conversation, ask the LLM to extract reusable skill snippets and save them to the instance's skills/ directory. Default off.

fields.name: inject_count
fields.label: Skills injected per turn
fields.help: Maximum dynamically retrieved skills injected into the system prompt each turn. 0 disables retrieval. Default 3.

fields.name: generation_half_life
fields.label: Generation half-life
fields.help: Memory reinforcement signals decay by half every N skill generations. Default 5. Set to 0 to disable decay (signals always weighted as 1.0).

label: Storage
summary: Where hermind keeps conversation history and agent state.

fields.name: driver
fields.label: Driver
fields.help: Storage backend to use.

fields.name: sqlite_path
fields.label: SQLite path
fields.help: Filesystem path to the SQLite database file.

fields.name: postgres_url
fields.label: Postgres URL
fields.help: postgres://user:pass@host/db connection string.

label: Terminal
summary: Shell-exec backend used by the agent's bash tool.

fields.name: backend
fields.label: Backend
fields.help: Which execution backend to run shell commands through.

fields.name: cwd
fields.label: Working directory
fields.help: Absolute path used as cwd for each command. Empty = backend default.

fields.name: timeout
fields.label: Default timeout (seconds)
fields.help: Command timeout; 0 means use the backend default.

fields.name: docker_image
fields.label: Docker image
fields.help: Image name passed to `docker run`.

fields.name: ssh_host
fields.label: SSH host
fields.help: Hostname or IP of the target machine.

fields.name: ssh_key
fields.label: SSH key path
fields.help: Filesystem path to the private key file.

fields.name: singularity_image
fields.label: Singularity image
fields.help: Path to the .sif image file.

label: Tracing
summary: Stdlib-based tracing emitted to a JSON-lines sink.

fields.name: enabled
fields.label: Enabled
fields.help: Turn tracing on.

fields.name: file
fields.label: File
fields.help: Path to the JSON-lines trace file. Leave blank for stderr.

label: Web tools
summary: Web search provider configuration. DuckDuckGo is the keyless fallback and always available.

fields.name: search.provider
fields.label: Search provider
fields.help: Leave blank to auto-select by priority (Tavily > Brave > Exa > DuckDuckGo).

fields.name: search.providers.tavily.api_key
fields.label: Tavily API key
fields.help: Env var TAVILY_API_KEY overrides this value at runtime.

fields.name: search.providers.brave.api_key
fields.label: Brave Search API key
fields.help: Env var BRAVE_API_KEY overrides this value at runtime.

fields.name: search.providers.exa.api_key
fields.label: Exa API key
fields.help: Env var EXA_API_KEY overrides this value at runtime.

fields.name: search.providers.duckduckgo.url
fields.label: Proxy URL
fields.help: Proxy endpoint URL (e.g., http://proxy.corp.com:8080 or socks5://proxy:1080). Leave blank to disable.

fields.name: search.providers.duckduckgo.username
fields.label: Proxy username
fields.help: Optional proxy authentication username.

fields.name: search.providers.duckduckgo.password
fields.label: Proxy password
fields.help: Optional proxy authentication password.
